title: Bothan runaway gambit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Bothan runaway gambit''' was a tactic used by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] for escape from dangerous situations, by making operable [[Starship/Legends|ships]] appear to be damaged.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

[[Category:Bothan culture|Runaway gambit]]
[[Category:Tactics]]
